summary: Party Location Tracker Feature Testing - 36 tests total (14 backend + 22 frontend). All tests PASSED. New PartyLocationTracker component fully functional in GM Screen.

breakdown.test_party_location_tracker.py (backend): 14/14 passed - World Map list, Nearby locations, Travel calculation, Local maps integration
breakdown.party-location-tracker.spec.ts (frontend: 22/22 passed (1 skipped) - GM Screen Location tab, World Map selector, Location selection, Places of Interest, Travel Distances, Travel Mode selector, Travel button

seed_data_creation: Created test world map 'Forgotten Realms' with 3 pins (Waterdeep, Baldurs Gate, Neverwinter) and 2 travel paths for stress test campaign
context_for_next_testing_agent: Party Location Tracker feature is fully tested. The component allows GMs to: 1) Select world map from dropdown, 2) Choose current party location from pins, 3) See places of interest from linked local maps, 4) View travel distances to nearby locations with different travel modes (walking, horseback, cart, ship, flying), 5) Move party to new locations via Travel button. Test data was added to stress test campaign (world map ID: 7ca8a46c-2d19-4cb0-a9ac-ebb5cef035db).

features: Location tab visible in GM Screen sidebar
PartyLocationTracker component renders on tab click
World map dropdown shows available maps
Location pins list displays from selected world map
Location type badge (CAPITAL, CITY, etc) displays
Empty state message when no places mapped
All 5 travel modes displayed (On Foot, Horseback, Cart, Ship, Flying)
Clicking Travel moves party and shows toast
